  "complexity_notes": "Module implements a production-grade generic DataTable with associated hooks. Key complexity: useDataFetch manages async fetching with AbortController, debounced filters (useDebounce), and pagination/sort state. DataTableComponent uses useMemo for selection context and sorted data, conditional rendering for loading/error/empty states, and inline keyboard/aria handling for accessibility. Logic for toggleAll and selection uses Set operations. Sorting supports custom sortFn or generic compareValues with type-based comparison (string localeCompare, number subtraction, fallback string compare). Pagination renders a windowed page list (max 5 buttons). No classes; all logic via functions and React hooks. Type generics used extensively (TData, TColumn, TFilters)."
}
